generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know that weak alliance commitments are making us vulnerable? While we're tied down by outdated agreements, other nations are exploiting our goodwill. Recent attacks show how unprepared we are when we don't prioritize our own security. It's time to demand our leaders put America first and stop gambling with our safety. #NationalSecurity #AmericaFirst
